questions.q: What is cold brew coffee made by doing?
choices: Soaking coarse grounds in cold water for an extended period

Sun-drying whole coffee cherries; primarily used in Africa
Machine separation of beans; primarily used in Asia
Rapid heat treatment; primarily used in South America
